'''thabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:womanlike|womanlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:womanlike|womanlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thabate|thabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thabatesher|thabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thabatesherĂ«m|thabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thabatero|thabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thabateshĂ«|thabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thabateshĂ«m|thabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithabatero|gokithabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithabateshĂ«|gokithabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithabateshĂ«m|gokithabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothabankerom|gothabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothabankeshĂ«|gothabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothabankeshĂ«m|gothabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothabankeya|gothabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thabaterom|thabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thabatemu|thabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thabateya|thabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithabaterom|gokithabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithabatemu|gokithabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithabateya|gokithabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thababate|thababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thababatesher|thababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thababatesherĂ«m|thababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thababatero|thababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thababateshĂ«|thababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thababateshĂ«m|thababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithababatero|gokithababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithababateshĂ«|gokithababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithababateshĂ«m|gokithababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothababankerom|gothababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothababankeshĂ«|gothababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothababankeshĂ«m|gothababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothababankeya|gothababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thababaterom|thababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thababatemu|thababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thababateya|thababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithababaterom|gokithababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithababatemu|gokithababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithababateya|gokithababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠbĂŠte|thĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠbĂŠtesher|thĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠbĂŠtero|thĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠbĂŠtero|gokithĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠbĂŠterom|thĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠbĂŠtemu|thĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠbĂŠteya|thĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠbĂŠterom|gokithĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠbĂŠteya|gokithĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafbafte|thafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafbaftesher|thafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafbaftesherĂ«m|thafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafbaftero|thafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafbafteshĂ«|thafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafbafteshĂ«m|thafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafbaftero|gokithafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafbafteshĂ«|gokithafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafbafteshĂ«m|gokithafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafbafnkerom|gothafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafbafnkeshĂ«|gothafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafbafnkeshĂ«m|gothafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafbafnkeya|gothafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafbafterom|thafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafbaftemu|thafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafbafteya|thafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafbafterom|gokithafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafbaftemu|gokithafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafbafteya|gokithafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
